name: Rytr
description: Affordable AI writing for blogs, emails, ads, social media. 40+ use cases, 30+ languages. Plagiarism-free with adjustable tone. SEO analysis checks readability and keywords. Chrome extension. Free plan with monthly limit.

name: Sudowrite
description: AI writing companion for fiction authors. Story Engine generates thousands of words from a premise. Character development, world building, style transfer, expand/rewrite tools. For novelists and creative writers.

name: QuillBot
description: Popular AI paraphrasing tool with Standard, Creative, Formal modes. Grammar checker, plagiarism checker, summarizer, citation generator, translator. Co-Writer workspace. Browser extension. Premium for quality.

name: Wordtune
description: AI rewriting assistant for clearer impact. Multiple options: shorter, longer, formal, casual. Translation across 30+ languages. Spices add examples. Browser extension everywhere. Tone adjustment for audiences.

name: Kittl AI
description: AI design platform generating graphics, text effects, brand assets from prompts. AI text effects for typography, patterns for backgrounds, brand kits. Template library for print-on-demand and social media.
shortDesc: AI design for text effects and brand graphics

name: Hypotenuse AI
description: Content generation for SEO articles, product descriptions, ad copy. Researches topics from web with source citations. Bulk generation, brand voice, multi-language. WordPress and Shopify integrations.
shortDesc: AI content writer with SEO research

name: LongShot AI
description: AI long-form writing with fact-checking and source attribution. Detects errors, adds citations automatically. SEO content with keyword planning. Topic research, content reuse, template workflows.
